title: RemoveData
description:
`remove` — take skills off THIS device. A followed skill becomes a per-device exclusion (other
devices keep receiving it); an untracked local copy (or a never-published tracked one) is deleted
permanently. **INFERRED.**

applied.description: `true` on the `--yes` apply, `false` on the describe (nothing changed yet).

agent_dirs.description: The agent directories cleaned (or, on the describe, that would be cleaned).

bytes_kept.description:
Whether the sidecar bytes are kept (a followed exclusion / a tracked-local keeps the bytes as a
frozen copy; an untracked-local delete removes the only copy there is).

kind.description: How the removal behaves for this skill.

note.description:
A removal-specific disclosure (the built-in skill's durable opt-out + its way back). Absent
for ordinary removals. **INFERRED** (additive).

workspace_id.description: The workspace the exclusion is recorded in (a followed skill); absent for a local copy.

RemoveKind.description: How `remove` treats one skill. **INFERRED value set.**

oneOf.description: A followed skill → a per-device exclusion (the server keeps delivering it to your other devices).
An untracked local copy in an agent dir → permanent delete (no other copy exists).
A tracked, never-published local skill → permanent delete (the sidecar entry drops too).
